meaning: n.[罗神]谷类的女神,犹如希腊神化中的Demeter
examples: The largest asteroid is Ceres, which is about a quarter the size of the moon.
Ceres was the first and is the largest of what became many objects discovered at that same distance.
Ceres hopes those days will soon return.
Mindy Lubber is president of Ceres and director of the Investor Network on Climate Risk (INCR).
Mindy S. Lubber is the president of Ceres and a founding board member of the organization.
